chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 343 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1760/2020 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 01-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation is received. From the comments filed by the Respondents, it appears that the Petitioner, who appeared in the interview, could not qualify, therefore, in view of the latest verdict of the Apex Court, the failure has no right to invoke the Constitutional jurisdiction of this Court. In such circumstances, the Petition is dismissed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
